name: Ryu-Ge Realm - Wyrm Winds
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>登</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>朧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>門</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
You can only control 1 "Ryu-Ge Realm - Wyrm Winds". Any monster sent from the field to the GY during your opponent's turn is banished instead. "Ryu-Ge" Pendulum Monsters, and Level 10 or higher monsters whose original Type is Wyrm, that you control, gain this effect.
● Once per opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can place 1 "Ryu-Ge" Continuous Spell you control on the bottom of the Deck, then target 1 face-up monster on the field; its ATK becomes 0.
eff:
You can only control 1 "Ryu-Ge Realm - Wyrm Winds". Any monster sent from the field to the GY during your opponent's turn is banished instead. "Ryu-Ge" Pendulum Monsters, and Level 10 or higher monsters whose original Type is Wyrm, that you control, gain this effect.
● Once per opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can place 1 "Ryu-Ge" Continuous Spell you control on the bottom of the Deck, then target 1 face-up monster on the field; its ATK becomes 0.

action: Places cards from the player's field on the bottom of the Deck for cost
banished: Banishes cards that would be sent to the Graveyard
